repos.name: azure-docs
repos.description: Official Azure documentation. Covers all Azure services including identity (Entra ID/AAD), storage, networking, compute, and security. Watch for: changes to default security settings, permission model updates, API breaking changes, deprecation of security controls, TLS/encryption policy changes, and silent fixes to authorization behavior.

repos.name: entra-docs
repos.description: Microsoft Entra (formerly Azure AD) documentation. Covers identity, authentication, authorization, conditional access, and MFA. Watch for: mandatory MFA enforcement, token validation changes, app registration breaking changes, conditional access policy defaults, and cross-tenant trust changes.

repos.name: azure-docs-powershell
repos.description: Azure PowerShell cmdlet documentation. Watch for: deprecated cmdlets affecting security operations, parameter changes in identity/RBAC commands, and breaking changes in automation scripts that manage security configurations.

repos.name: azure-docs-cli
repos.description: Azure CLI reference documentation. Watch for: breaking changes in az commands for RBAC, keyvault, network security groups, and identity management. Parameter renames or removed commands can break security automation.

repos.name: defender-docs
repos.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Endpoint, and Identity documentation. Watch for: security posture changes, alert logic updates, recommendation deprecations, connector changes, and shifts in default protection policies.

repos.name: microsoft-365-docs
repos.description: Microsoft 365 documentation covering Purview, DLP, compliance policies, and security features. Watch for: data loss prevention rule changes, compliance policy defaults, sensitivity label behavior changes, and audit log schema updates.

repos.name: azure-stack-docs
repos.description: Azure Stack Hub and HCI documentation for hybrid cloud deployments. Watch for: security update policies, certificate rotation changes, identity provider integration changes, and network security defaults for disconnected environments.
